历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 17377 → 16669 → 16551 → 15239, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking number), with a cumulative forward movement of about 2138 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 15239; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 95 in 2022, 96 in 2023, 100 in 2024, and 103 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 109, an increase of 6 from 2025, an expansion of about 5.8%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 62nd in 2021 to 57th in 2026, with a continuous improvement in recent years, reflecting growing recognition of the university's comprehensive strength; the 2024 reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, mainly involving a survey on teacher ethics, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity total ranking 7th (high heat), with comprehensive popularity of about 7.4 million, highlighting high exposure among 211 universities, reflecting high attention from applicants; no record of enrollment gaps; Chemical Engineering and Technology rated A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, totaling 3 disciplines rated A- or above, highly matching the university's chemical and materials majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, a cross-province application; the university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2-3%, with no significant regional preference; majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended with high social heat, and the university's related majors (Computer Science, Automation, etc.) benefit; majors in Chemistry, Biology, Environment, and Materials are still clearly discouraged, and the university's chemical and materials majors account for a large proportion, creating a divergence; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from about 463,000 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of about 5.8% in 2026 easing competition, the increase of about 15.6% in provincial candidates intensifying competition, and the high Douyin heat exposure boosting attention, the effects of expansion and candidate increase partially offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward compared to the 2025 baseline but with limited magnitude; the predicted minimum ranking is about 15272, with a range of 14772-15772.

For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<14772), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 elite classes and dual degree programs.
